About

Mission-Informed
Integration

With a desire to continue “Service after Service”, Heightened Senses, LLC was founded by a Purple Heart recipient and USMC Gunnery Sergeant with multi-disciplinary operational backgrounds spanning infantry, surveillance and countersurveillance, and intelligence roles. We are a trusted UAS systems integrator, C-UAS sensor deployer, and NDAA-compliant technology procurement accelerator — specializing in the federal, defence, and public safety sectors.


We function as a trusted integrator and procurement accelerator — sourcing from verified U.S. manufacturers, reducing supply chain friction, and aligning systems to mission requirements. Not just hardware. Mission-informed judgment at every engagement.

Authorized Platforms

BLUE UAS CERTIFIED
Black Widow™
Tactical ISR Quadrotor · Army SRR Program of Record

U.S.-manufactured short-range reconnaissance sUAS. EO/IR dual sensor, 45+ min endurance, GPS-denied capable via Palantir VNav, Doodle Labs mesh radio integrated, ATAK compatible.

45+ MIN 5 MI RANGE FLIR EO/IR ATAK GPS-DENIED AI TARGET REC.
BLUE UAS CERTIFIED
FANG™ FPV
FPV Drone System · NDAA Compliant

Lowest-cost family of NDAA-compliant FPV drones on the market. Retrievable and reusable. Blue UAS Certified October 2025. Integrates with ATAK ecosystem.

NDAA COMPLIANT FPV RETRIEVABLE ATAK LOW COST
ISR + MAPPING
TRICHON™
Military-Grade Hybrid VTOL Tri-Copter

Extended endurance hybrid VTOL. Tool-free payload swap. Supports ISR, mapping, and photogrammetry missions. Transitions between hover and forward flight for maximum range.

VTOL EXTENDED ENDURANCE PHOTOGRAMMETRY PAYLOAD SWAP
What We Do

Core Capabilities

Every capability is grounded in operational experience. We integrate, advise, and deliver — with supply chain integrity and mission alignment at every step.

Mission Packages
RSA
Rapid Situational Awareness
Black Widow · EO/IR · Doodle Labs / ATAK. Immediate overhead awareness at dynamic incident scenes for law enforcement, fire, and emergency management.
PIM
Persistent Infrastructure Monitor
Trichon · EO/IR + Photogrammetry · Persistent MANET. Recurring inspection and digital twin generation for utilities, pipelines, transportation, and ports.
IPA
Integrated Perimeter Awareness
Black Widow · Trillium EO/IR + MatrixSpace Radar. Persistent aerial and ground-based situational awareness with unified common operating picture for critical infrastructure.
🛰
UAS Integration
End-to-end platform integration and mission configuration. We align systems to requirements — not requirements to systems.
📡
C-UAS Sensing
MatrixSpace compact radar integration for airspace awareness, drone detection, and counter-UAS advisory support.
🔒
Secure Comms
Doodle Labs mesh radio integration. Frequency-stepping for EW resilience. ATAK ecosystem native.
🗺
Aerial Data Services
FAA Part 107 compliant operations. Photogrammetry, digital twins, orthomosaic products, and infrastructure inspection.
📦
NDAA Procurement
Compliant sourcing from verified U.S. manufacturers. Supply chain aggregation to reduce procurement friction and accelerate delivery.
🏛
Federal Advisory
ASDA compliance consulting, GSA Revision 3 transition support, and Blue UAS certification pathway advisory. WAWF / PIEE invoicing support.
⚡
Power & Sustainment
Military-grade battery systems (Bren-Tronics), ruggedized energy storage (Packet Digital), and sustainment spares sourcing.
✈
Avionics & Controls
ARK Electronics NDAA-compliant flight controllers across DoD-aligned UAS builds. Hard requirement met across the ecosystem.
Authorized Reseller & Vendor Relationships

Partner Ecosystem

Red Cat Holdings
Authorized Reseller · Public Safety & DoD

ARACHNID Family of Systems — Black Widow, FANG, Trichon. Blue UAS Certified. Army SRR program of record. Authorized reseller for Public Safety and DoD markets.

ARK Electronics
Preferred Partner · Avionics

NDAA-compliant avionics and flight control systems. Hard requirement across DoD-aligned UAS builds and federal procurement programs.

Additional partnerships in negotiation — ecosystem expanding Q2 2025.
